subcodes.title: Words to family and friends, spoken on 1920-11-25
subcodes.first_line: The friends who departed recently, that is, the friends from America, Mrs. Goodall, Mrs. Cooper, Mrs. Ralston, Mrs. Frankland, and from France, Mr. And Mrs. Dreyfus
